content: If you don't behave, Santa won't come.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by CK (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Se non si comporta bene, Babbo Natale non verrà
ita:Se non ti comporti bene, Babbo Natale non verrà
ita:Se non vi comportate bene, Babbo Natale non verrà
tha:ถ้าคุณไม่ประพฤติตามซานต้าก็จะไม่มา
